text:
龍族の信頼を得て、ゼノ、エコーと共に
訪れたのは浮遊大陸の奥地。
待っていた老龍族ロ・カミツは
<%me>に
龍族との交流を感謝し
託したいものがあると告げた。
――――――――――――――――――――
失敗条件/戦闘不能後、リタイアを選択

龍族の信頼を得て、ゼノ、エコーと共に訪れたのは
浮遊大陸の奥地。待っていた老龍族ロ・カミツは
<%me>に、龍族との
交流を感謝し、託したいものがあると告げた。

At the request of the Draconians, the party made
their way to the deepest part of the Floating
Continent, where the old Draconian Ro'Kamiz
waited. He thanked <%me>
for their rapprochement with the Draconians
and claimed that there was something with
which he would like to entrust them.
-------------------------------------------
You will fail this quest if you become incapacitated
or retire.

By request of the Draconians, the party went to the deepest
part of the Floating Continent, where Ro'Kamiz waited.
He thanked <%me> for dealing with
the Draconians and entrust them with a special request.
惑星アムドゥスキア　浮遊大陸
